params.value: SELECT Id, OwnerId, Owner.Name, Amount, Name, StageName, CloseDate, LastActivityDate, AccountId, Account.Name, Winback_Pilot__c FROM Opportunity WHERE IsClosed = false AND (Winback_Pilot__c > 0 OR Account.Bookings_last_12_months__c = 0) AND RecordType.Name != 'Customer Self Service' AND OwnerId IN ({{JS_Config.repIdInClause()}}) ORDER BY OwnerId LIMIT 1000

CUSTOM_ACTION.path: query/?q=SELECT Id, OwnerId, Owner.Name, Amount, Name, StageName, CloseDate, LastActivityDate, AccountId, Account.Name, Winback_Pilot__c FROM Opportunity WHERE IsClosed = false AND (Winback_Pilot__c > 0 OR Account.Bookings_last_12_months__c = 0) AND RecordType.Name != 'Customer Self Service' AND OwnerId IN ({{JS_Config.repIdInClause()}}) ORDER BY OwnerId LIMIT 1000
